caption:
The Ferrari Makes It Even More Aesthetic 🫠
.
.
📹 charles_leclerc & antoine 
.
.
The Scuderia Ferrari star began a new chapter away from the lights of Formula 1. From the streets of Monaco to the grand stages of the world, Leclerc has built his legacy through passion, resilience, and relentless determination. Now, alongside the roar of V6 engines and the pursuit of world championships, he steps into a new journey — one defined by love and commitment.
For Ferrari fans, this feels like watching the “Prince of Scuderia” grow beyond the cockpit. The same focus and loyalty he shows every race weekend are now part of his personal story. While he continues chasing glory in red, today is about something bigger than podiums — it’s about partnership, promises, and a lifetime ahead.
A special moment in the life of one of Formula 1’s brightest stars. ❤️
.
.
Lando Norris, Max Verstappen, f1, Formula 1, Lewis Hamilton, Charles leclerc, Oscar Piastri, Scuderia Ferrari, Ferrari, Mercedes, RedBull Racing, McLaren, Viral, Reels, Trending, f1 Memes, Alexandra Saint Mleux, Cl16

caption:
Reports suggest Aston Martin could take drastic action at the Australian Grand Prix due to ongoing reliability concerns.

After struggling in pre-season testing and completing one of the lowest lap counts, the team is reportedly considering starting the race, completing the formation lap, and retiring the car early to avoid further damage.

Nothing has been officially confirmed yet, but the situation highlights just how serious their early-season issues might be.

(Source: Motorsport Italia)

#f1 #formula1 #astonmartin #alonso #fernandoalonso

Our season starts this week! 
Join us on Patreon on Tuesday, 3rd March, for a close look at all the details in our 2026 liveries. 

And on Youtube on Wednesday, 4th March for our season opener episode. (It’s the longest video we’ve ever made(/making, still working on it).

This marks the first major evolutionary upgrade for our characters since 2020. Excited for a new season!

author: boxboxnightmares

caption:
They're Official! 🫶

Charles Leclerc is officially married ❤️💍
The Scuderia Ferrari star has began a new chapter away from the lights of Formula 1. From the streets of Monaco to the grand stages of the world, Leclerc has built his legacy through passion, resilience, and relentless determination. Now, alongside the roar of V6 engines and the pursuit of world championships, he steps into a new journey — one defined by love and commitment.
For Ferrari fans, this feels like watching the “Prince of Scuderia” grow beyond the cockpit. The same focus and loyalty he shows every race weekend are now part of his personal story. While he continues chasing glory in red, today is about something bigger than podiums — it’s about partnership, promises, and a lifetime ahead.
A special moment in the life of one of Formula 1’s brightest stars. ❤️

Do NOT use this graphic for reposting!!
